title: Eddy (Jake) — Paladin
bodyText:
Fisherman from **Shipton** — except he isn't. White-eyed **Aasimar** paladin (Oath made S07), now confirmed to be **in the wrong body**: Ms. Judy's solo ritual (S16) showed his Shipton family is an old tale, *famously dead* — and they were never Aasimar. Kena added that he may be **far older than he appears** (S15). Carries **Velmir**, Trunks' formerly-cursed shadow sword (curse lifted by Eira).

# What the table knows
- Patchwork memory: real Shipton childhood (sister, carving with mother, knots with father **Kol**) braided with impossible memories — red comet, unfinished symbol, the sun drowning, chained underwater, wanting to die and not being allowed.
- Recurring dreams: Shipton burning, thick water, the red-haired cloaked healer dying for him, the white-haired girl walking away.
- S24 prep: his reflection will be a golden-eyed stranger mouthing **"Remember."**

> [!dm] **The Character Trinity ([[the-pool]]):** Body = **Lathandar's** (sent out of the pool with Leliana's help; unlockable divine power). Mind = the fisherman Jake plays. Soul ≈ **Edrelon of Shipton** ("The Priest's Descent": Kol's son who fled the drowning town). The caged voice wants him "brought back."
